    <!DOCTYPE html>
    <html lang="zh-CN">
    <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>日本九州12天旅行日程表</title>
    <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
    <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/font-awesome@4.7.0/css/font-awesome.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
    <script>
    tailwind.config = {
    theme: {
    extend: {
    colors: {
    primary: '#3B82F6',
    secondary: '#F97316',
    accent: '#EC4899',
    neutral: '#64748B',
    },
    fontFamily: {
    sans: ['Noto Sans SC', 'sans-serif'],
    },
    }
    }
    }
    </script>
    <style type="text/tailwindcss">
    @layer utilities {
    .text-shadow {
    text-shadow: 1px 1px 3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
    }
    .card-hover {
    transition: transform 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease;
    }
    .card-hover:hover {
    transform: translateY(-5px);
    box-shadow: 0 10px 25px -5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1), 0 10px 10px -5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04);
    }
    }
    </style>
    </head>
    <body class="bg-gray-50 font-sans text-gray-800">
    <!-- 頂部導航欄 -->
    <header class="bg-primary text-white shadow-md sticky top-0 z-50">
    <div class="container mx-auto px-4 py-4 flex justify-between items-center">
    <h1 class="text-2xl font-bold">日本九州12天旅行日程表</h1>
    <div class="flex items-center space-x-4">
    <span class="hidden md:inline"><i class="fa fa-calendar mr-2"></i>2025年8月1日-8月12日</span>
    <button id="toggleTheme" class="p-2 rounded-full hover:bg-primary-700 transition-colors">
    <i class="fa fa-moon-o"></i>
    </button>
    </div>
    </div>
    </header>
    <!-- 主横幅 -->
    <div class="relative h-64 md:h-96 bg-cover bg-center" style="background-image: url('https://www.snowmonkeyresorts.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/05/22930049_m-2.jpg')">
    <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-black bg-opacity-50 flex items-center justify-center">
    <div class="text-center text-white p-4">
    <h2 class="text-3xl md:text-5xl font-bold mb-4 text-shadow">日本九州之旅</h2>
    <p class="text-xl md:text-2xl text-shadow">福岡·長崎·阿蘇·別府·北九州</p>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- 主要内容 -->
    <main class="container mx-auto px-4 py-8">
    <!-- 旅行概覽 -->
    <section class="mb-12">
    <h2 class="text-2xl font-bold mb-6 text-primary border-b-2 border-primary pb-2">旅行概覽</h2>
    <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
    <div class="bg-white rounded-lg shadow p-6 card-hover">
    <div class="text-primary text-4xl mb-4"><i class="fa fa-calendar-check-o"></i></div>
    <h3 class="text-xl font-semibold mb-2">行程天數</h3>
    <p class="text-gray-600">12天11夜精彩旅程</p>
    </div>
    <div class="bg-white rounded-lg shadow p-6 card-hover">
    <div class="text-secondary text-4xl mb-4"><i class="fa fa-map-marker"></i></div>
    <h3 class="text-xl font-semibold mb-2">目的地</h3>
    <p class="text-gray-600">福岡、豪斯登堡、阿蘇火山、別府市、Bio Park</p>
    </div>
    <div class="bg-white rounded-lg shadow p-6 card-hover">
    <div class="text-accent text-4xl mb-4"><i class="fa fa-camera"></i></div>
    <h3 class="text-xl font-semibold mb-2">精彩體驗</h3>
    <p class="text-gray-600">主題樂園、動物園、溫泉、夜景</p>
    </div>
    </div>
    </section>
    <!-- 每日行程 -->
    <section>
    <h2 class="text-2xl font-bold mb-6 text-primary border-b-2 border-primary pb-2">每日行程詳情</h2>
    <!-- 8月1日行程 -->
    <div class="mb-10 bg-white rounded-lg shadow overflow-hidden">
    <div class="bg-primary text-white p-4">
    <h3 class="text-xl font-bold flex items-center">
    <i class="fa fa-sun-o mr-2"></i>8月1日 星期五 金曜日 Day1
    </h3>
    </div>
    <div class="p-6">
    <ul class="space-y-4">
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">15:05</span>
    <div>
    <p>香港往日本福岡</p>
    <div class="ml-4 mt-2 space-y-2 text-sm">
    <p><span class="text-sm text-gray-500">入境 <a href="https://kwiksure.com/zh/article/visit-japan-joint-kiosk/" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">自助通關機使用教學</a> 、 <a href="https://www.vjw.digital.go.jp/main/#/vjwplo001" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">Visit Japan Web</a></p>
    </div>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">19:30</span>
    <p>到達 <a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/WXmaegZPYaCZPDtu6" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">日本福岡機場</a></p>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">20:30</span>
    <div>
    <p>到達 <a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/5dP7AYEA8tmLhncNA" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">博多站</a></p>
    <div class="ml-4 mt-2 space-y-2 text-sm">
    <p>博多車站地下街官網 <span class="text-sm text-gray-500"><a href="https://www.e-ekichika.com/" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">網頁</a> , <a href="https://www.e-ekichika.com/floormap" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">Map</a></span><p>
    <div class="ml-4 mt-2 space-y-2 text-sm">
    <p>餃子屋 弐ノ弐 <span class="text-sm text-gray-500"><a href="https://www.e-ekichika.com/shop/ninoni" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">網頁</a> , 薄皮酥脆的餃子(營業時間 11:00～22:30)</span><p>
    <p>至福の一杯 ラーメン博魂 <span class="text-sm text-gray-500"><a href="https://www.e-ekichika.com/shop/hakkon" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">網頁</a> , 豬骨拉麵、明太子豬骨拉麵、熟成醬油拉麵、玄海鹽拉麵(營業時間 11:00～21:00（最後點餐時間 20:45）)</span><p>
    <p>超速鮮魚®寿司 羽田市場 <span class="text-sm text-gray-500"><a href="https://www.e-ekichika.com/shop/hanedaichiba" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">網頁</a> , 壽司(營業時間 11:00～22:00（最後點餐時間 21:00）)</span><p>
    <p>名代ラーメン亭 <span class="text-sm text-gray-500"><a href="https://www.e-ekichika.com/shop/nadai_ramentei" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">網頁</a> , 博多拉麵、中華炒飲(營業時間 11:00～21:00（最後點餐時間 20:30）)</span><p>
    <p>とりかわ長政 <span class="text-sm text-gray-500"><a href="https://www.e-ekichika.com/shop/torikawa-nagamasa" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">網頁</a> , <span class="text-sm text-gray-500"><a href="https://torikawa-nagamasa.com/menu/" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">MENU</a> , 串燒 (營業時間 11:00～23:00)</span><p>
    </div>
    <p>博多車站1番街 <span class="text-sm text-gray-500"><a href="https://www.hakata-1bangai.com/" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">網頁</a> , <a href="https://www.hakata-1bangai.com/recommends/" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">Map</a></span><p>
    <div class="ml-4 mt-2 space-y-2 text-sm">
    <p>うな丼定食 <span class="text-sm text-gray-500"><a href="https://www.hakata-1bangai.com/floorguide/shop8.html" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">網頁</a> , 自製麵條和高湯製成的正宗蕎麥麵(營業時間 11:00～22:00（最後點餐時間 21:30）)</span><p>
    <p>博多屋台 一幸舎 <span class="text-sm text-gray-500"><a href="https://www.hakata-1bangai.com/floorguide/shop20.html" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">網頁</a> , 傳統博多拉麵(營業時間 11:00～21:00（最後點餐時間 20:30）)</span><p>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">22:00</span>
    <div>
    <p>入住 <a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/WVQaNEhDDBBHCnVQ8" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">福岡博多巴士總站東橫INN</a></p>
    <div class="ml-4 mt-2 space-y-2 text-sm">
    <p><span class="text-sm text-gray-500"><a href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1GL_6mcy4RAg-_nS5KX-McUJX_tD-uoh9/view?usp=drive_link" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">booking ticket</a></span>
    <p>----執整行李----<p>
    </div>
    </div>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-42">________________________________________</span>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">24hr便利店</span>
    <div>
    <p>酒店附近</p>
    <div class="ml-4 mt-2 space-y-2 text-sm">
    <p>7-11 博多站前1丁目店 <span class="text-sm text-gray-500"><a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/vX9xMYmEHPKCsyJTA" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">Map</a></span><p>
    <p>全家 博多站前店 <span class="text-sm text-gray-500"><a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/oFoC5PaSNAF8ZcRbA" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">Map</a></span><p>
    </div>
    </div>
    </li>
    </ul>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- 8月2日行程 -->
    <div class="mb-10 bg-white rounded-lg shadow overflow-hidden">
    <div class="bg-primary text-white p-4">
    <h3 class="text-xl font-bold flex items-center">
    <i class="fa fa-sun-o mr-2"></i>8月2日 星期六 土曜日 Day2
    </h3>
    </div>
    <div class="p-6">
    <ul class="space-y-4">
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">08:00</span>
    <p>(早餐)酒店早餐(飯團/面包等)</p>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">09:00</span>
    <p>拎車出發往 <a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/n1ZzN5oevsboxgu89" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">豪斯登堡日航酒店</a>.<a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/hFDxTrFa2QAtNPUB8" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">(105min車程)</a></p>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">10:45</span>
    <div>
    <p>到達豪斯登堡日航酒店入住酒店</p>
    <div class="ml-4 mt-2 space-y-2 text-sm">
    <p><span class="text-sm text-gray-500"><a href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1SNmWycdVBCP4gYDAPZt3WHhlYskjcbiq/view?usp=drive_link" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">booking ticket</a></span>
    <p><span class="text-sm text-gray-500">下載用官方 <a href="https://chinese01.huistenbosch.co.jp/official-app/" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">HUIS TEN BOSCH APP</a> 設施、餐廳等待時間、演出日程、地圖路線向導等</span><p>
    </div>
    </div>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">12:00</span>
    <p>樂園遊玩</p>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">午餐</span>
    <p>在豪斯登堡內</p>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">晚餐</span>
    <p>在豪斯登堡內</p>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">20:00</span>
    <p>欣賞樂園煙花</p>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">21:00</span>
    <div>
    <p>返回酒店休息</p>
    <div class="ml-4 mt-2 space-y-2 text-sm">
    <p>大浴場 06:00～10:00, 16:00～24:00, 大澡堂備有浴巾、擦臉毛巾、剃須刀、洗髮露、護髮素、沐浴露 <span class="text-sm text-gray-500"><a href="https://d3g2yh83to8qa2.cloudfront.net/wp-content/uploads/1/2016/05/09012248/baths-ngsz_600x250.jpg" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">Photo</a></span><p>
    <p>----執整行李----<p>
    </div>
    </div>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-42">________________________________________</span>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">24hr便利店</span>
    <div>
    <p>酒店附近</p>
    <div class="ml-4 mt-2 space-y-2 text-sm">
    <p>7-11 佐世保針尾橋店 <span class="text-sm text-gray-500"><a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/fzztp5BN1jhfSq4CA" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">Map</a></span><p>
    </div>
    </div>
    </li>
    </ul>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- 8月3日行程 -->
    <div class="mb-10 bg-white rounded-lg shadow overflow-hidden">
    <div class="bg-primary text-white p-4">
    <h3 class="text-xl font-bold flex items-center">
    <i class="fa fa-sun-o mr-2"></i>8月3日 星期日 日曜日 Day3
    </h3>
    </div>
    <div class="p-6">
    <ul class="space-y-4">
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">08:30</span>
    <div>
    <p>(早餐)酒店自助早餐</p>
    <div class="ml-4 mt-2 space-y-2 text-sm">
    <p>1/F Lavanderoie 早餐 06:45～09:30 <span class="text-sm text-gray-500"><a href="https://cf.bstatic.com/xdata/images/hotel/max1024x768/239293580.jpg?k=82619d6e1ce6020229ab73f37659ce117bafca39d28246442d883370bcd0d594&o=" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">Photo</a></span><p>
    </div>
    </div>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">10:30</span>
    <p>出發往 <a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/gsLvQMWymtX3AvMfA" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">長崎 Bio Park</a>.<a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/oE93ojqbT3RW5gdq5" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">(25min車程)</a></p>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">10:00</span>
    <div>
    <p>到達長崎 Bio Park <span class="text-sm text-gray-500"><a href="https://www.biopark.co.jp/en/" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">網頁</a></span></p>
    <div class="ml-4 mt-2 space-y-2 text-sm">
    <p>成人 2,100日圓, 3歲至小學生 1,100日圓 <span class="text-sm text-gray-500"><a href="https://www.biopark.co.jp/en/news/article/20250307_002508.html" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">入場費</a></span><p>
    <p>Guide Map & Animals <span class="text-sm text-gray-500"><a href="https://www.biopark.co.jp/en/guidemap/" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">Link</a></span><p>
    </div>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">午餐</span>
    <div>
    <p><a href="https://www.biopark.co.jp/en/shops/" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">Park 內餐廳</a></p>
    <div class="ml-4 mt-2 space-y-2 text-sm">
    <p><span class="font-medium">1 "Quena":</span> 午餐套餐、披薩等美式菜餚和飲料</p>
    <p><span class="font-medium">2 "Saikai Burger":</span> 美式漢堡包</p>
    <p><span class="font-medium">3 "Kiwi":</span> 咖啡、飲料、冰淇淋和小吃</p>
    </div>
    </div>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">餵食時間/活動</span>
    <div class="ml-4 mt-2 space-y-2 text-sm">
    <p>10:30 狐猴-動物園管理員餵食</p>
    <p>11:00 小爪水獺-動物園管理員餵食</p>
    <p>11:30 河馬-餵食西瓜</p>
    <p>11:45 長頸鹿-動物園管理員餵食</p>
    <p>13:00 馬來貘-(體驗餵食200 yen About 30 min each)</p>
    <p>13:30 水豚-餵食西瓜</p>
    <p>14:00 巴西貘-(體驗餵食200 yen About 30 min each)</p>
    <p>14:00 浣熊-餵食西瓜</p>
    <p>15:30 河馬-(體驗餵食200 yen About 30 min each)</p>
    <p>15:30 美洲河狸-動物園管理員餵食</p>
    <p>15:30 河馬-餵食西瓜</p>
    </div>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">16:00</span>
    <div>
    <p>出發往 <a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/D6eba4w3MDjfDFaU6" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">稻佐山觀光酒店</a>.<a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/HtjXn9gRhbk9hj1a7" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">(60min車程)</a></p>
    <div class="ml-4 mt-2 space-y-2 text-sm">
    <p>長崎市 <a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/f5LEGzWtHb4rFW8a6" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">ENEOS セルフ城山SS(フジオカ)</a><strong style="color:#FF5733">加油站</strong><p>
    </div>
    </div>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">17:00</span>
    <div>
    <p>到達酒店及參與兒童節活動</p>
    <div class="ml-4 mt-2 space-y-2 text-sm">
    <p><span class="text-sm text-gray-500"><a href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1jx_S8mvFegwwroDQSrJLfn-rNdigExgx/view?usp=drive_link" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">booking ticket</a></span>
    <p>館內1/F兒童節日（含金魚投擲遊戲） <span class="text-sm text-gray-500"><a href="https://upload.tabichat.com/images/hotel_plan_image/4c942686-3227-4717-87d9-01461064f3c9.jpg" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">LINK</a></span><p>
    <p>贈送每位兒童價值500日圓（每張100日圓）的兒童節門票<p>
    </div>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">19:00</span>
    <div>
    <p>(晚餐)酒店壽喜燒晚餐</p>
    <div class="ml-4 mt-2 space-y-2 text-sm">
    <p>和牛壽喜燒套餐(前菜拼盤·時令羹湯·魚生擺盤·當季炸物·和牛壽喜燒·米飯·漬物·味噌湯·水果拼盤) <span class="text-sm text-gray-500"><a href="https://storage.googleapis.com/studio-design-asset-files/projects/xPORKjrJqr/s-2339x1654_v-frms_webp_dba8dcc0-61fd-4c16-a4a6-aa03ef643433_middle.webp" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">MENU</a></span><p>
    </div>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">21:00</span>
    <p>揸車上山頂看夜景 <a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/11HWc3E7pDqoD8zP6" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">稲佐山山頂駐車場</a>.<a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/SrWqNHagLUdu4Uv29" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">(10min車程)</a></p>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">22:00</span>
    <div>
    <p>返回酒店休息、浸溫泉及酒店夜景</p>
    <div class="ml-4 mt-2 space-y-2 text-sm">
    <p>展望大浴場(曙館３階 05:30～09:00, 16:00～24:00, 更衣室(設有置物櫃、吹風機), 二合一洗髮潤髮乳, 請自房間攜帶毛巾) <span class="text-sm text-gray-500"><a href="https://pix8.agoda.net/hotelImages/10565549/0/f72d93a598034f2c5e8d892e8ab6aa55.jpg?ce=0&s=1024x" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">Photo</a></span><p>
    <p>庭園露天風呂(本館地下1樓 17:00～24:00, 更衣室(設有置物櫃、吹風機), 二合一洗髮潤髮乳, 請自房間攜帶毛巾) <span class="text-sm text-gray-500"><a href="https://inasayama.sakura.ne.jp/rakutensite/images/bath/002.jpg" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">Photo</a></span><p>
    <p>酒店可見的夜景 <span class="text-sm text-gray-500"><a href="https://storage.googleapis.com/studio-design-asset-files/projects/xPORKjrJqr/s-1x1_1b1e4548-1c75-475e-808a-030ad787f316.pdf" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">MAP-pdf</a></span><p>
    <p>----執整行李----<p>
    </div>
    </div>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-42">________________________________________</span>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">24hr便利店</span>
    <div>
    <p>酒店附近</p>
    <div class="ml-4 mt-2 space-y-2 text-sm">
    <p>Lawson 長崎曙町店 <span class="text-sm text-gray-500"><a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/EF6yjGJeRNxqcdF96" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">Map</a></span><p>
    </div>
    </div>
    </li>
    </ul>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- 8月4日行程 -->
    <div class="mb-10 bg-white rounded-lg shadow overflow-hidden">
    <div class="bg-primary text-white p-4">
    <h3 class="text-xl font-bold flex items-center">
    <i class="fa fa-sun-o mr-2"></i>8月4日 星期一 月曜日 Day4
    </h3>
    </div>
    <div class="p-6">
    <ul class="space-y-4">
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">08:45</span>
    <p>(早餐)酒店自助早餐</p>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">09:45</span>
    <p>出發往 <a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/w6fKK89KvWrURKs29" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">雲仙多良展望台</a>.<a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/e91fJ48bRHy2vzSQ8" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">(60min車程)</a></p>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">11:35</span>
    <p>出發往 <a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/7chZTBYb1asxFsR78" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">大三東車站</a>.<a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/r81w8TPEDH2hcnoE8" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">(30min車程)</a></p>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">12:45</span>
    <div>
    <p>出發往 <a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/WAmFPVagxD19WvLK7" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">うちだ屋島原店</a>.<a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/2MgnW58kULKujYLZA" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">(2min車程)</a></p>
    <div class="ml-4 mt-2 space-y-2 text-sm">
    <p>MENU<span class="text-sm text-gray-500"><a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/bxPuwAXUK7qpBVYq8" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">01</a> , <span class="text-sm text-gray-500"><a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/XwFcv25GVFpMfina7" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;"> 02</a><p>
    </div>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">13:10</span>
    <p>出發往多比良港<strong style="color: red;">必須13:30到達</strong> <a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/XWVo2RUpY6vgYsJX6" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;"></a>準備上船 <a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/cDPz4jJwBJjoF4Fy7" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">多比良港</a>.<a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/zMN4F2qcmdZRiiXe9" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">(15min車程)</a></p></p>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">13:55</span>
    <p>多比良港座船開往 <a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/DtpMZUBTMJRQ5BGQA" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">長洲港</a>.<a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/Ez4Mf4u69vGy7LTx6" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">(45min船程)</a></p>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">15:00</span>
    <div>
    <p>出發往 <a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/MbjQWy2pXq2xBuh66" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">ASO田園空間博物館総合案内所(道の駅阿蘇)</a>.<a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/BBUL9zuKS8cxjxJ37" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">(90min車程)</a></p>
    <div class="ml-4 mt-2 space-y-2 text-sm">
    <p>買<span class="text-sm text-gray-500"><a href="https://media.zenfs.com/zh-Hant-HK/homerun/kkday_484/82da42751ed5fef70e7651676479762e" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">特產手信</a></span><p>
    <p>買<span class="text-sm text-gray-500"><a href="https://media.zenfs.com/zh-Hant-HK/homerun/kkday_484/18cd32c03f4a4d02c0c04f9586c6e695" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">ASO牛奶</a></span><p>
    </div>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">16:50</span>
    <div>
    <p>出發往 <a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/ztjHnp7dLXaUXfdV8" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">龜之井阿蘇公園度假村</a>.<a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/h7fhs2xZBzqvcyGu5" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">(5min車程)</a></p>
    <div class="ml-4 mt-2 space-y-2 text-sm">
    <p>阿蘇市 <a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/DcwD4MSniyj8Rkca7" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">ENEOS 阿蘇SS(宮岡)</a><strong style="color:#FF5733">加油站</strong></p>
    </div>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">17:00</span>
    <div>
    <p>入住酒店及浸溫泉</p>
    <div class="ml-4 mt-2 space-y-2 text-sm">
    <p><span class="text-sm text-gray-500"><a href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1LblHvTm-V40WyDe9_NPD8tb1h4RxoizV/view?usp=drive_link" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">booking ticket</a></span>
    <p>室內游泳池免費<span class="text-sm text-gray-500"><a href="https://kamenoi-hotels.com/tw/asoparkresort/spa/" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">檢查使用時間日曆</a></span><p>
    <p><span class="text-sm text-gray-500"><a href="https://kamenoi-hotels.com/asoparkresort/onsen/img/slider/daiyokujo/4.webp" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">大浴場</a>免費時間05:30～09:00, 15:00～24:00（最後入場時間23:30）</span><p>
    <p><span class="text-sm text-gray-500"><a href="https://kamenoi-hotels.com/tw/asoparkresort/onsen/" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">溫泉</a>免費時間05:30～09:00（最後入場時間8:30），16:00～23:00（最後入場時間22:30）</span><p>
    </div>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">19:30</span>
    <div>
    <p>(晚餐)酒店自助晚餐</p>
    <div class="ml-4 mt-2 space-y-2 text-sm">
    <p><span class="text-sm text-gray-500"><a href="https://kamenoi-hotels.com/tw/asoparkresort/restaurant/" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">自助晚餐</a>分為兩時段: 1st 18:00～19:30, 2nd 19:30～21:00</span><p>
    </div>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">21:00</span>
    <div>
    <p>回酒店房間休息</p>
    <div class="ml-4 mt-2 space-y-2 text-sm">
    <p><span class="text-sm text-gray-500">21:00～22:30供應夜鳴擔擔麵,一晚住宿含兩份</span><p>
    <p><span class="text-sm text-gray-500"><a href="https://kamenoi-hotels.com/asoparkresort/restaurant/img/thumb/tantan01.jpg" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">「紅」四川擔擔麵</a>(擔擔麵特製的辣椒油，它具有烤芝麻的芳香和花椒、四川豆豉等香料的香味)</span><p>
    <p><span class="text-sm text-gray-500"><a href="https://kamenoi-hotels.com/asoparkresort/restaurant/img/thumb/tantan02.jpg" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">「黑」黑芝麻擔擔麵</a>(烤芝麻、磨碎的芝麻、揉碎的芝麻和香濃的黑芝麻，再加上豆瓣醬和香料製成的，辣味十足)</span><p>
    <p><span class="text-sm text-gray-500"><a href="https://kamenoi-hotels.com/asoparkresort/restaurant/img/thumb/tantan03.jpg" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">「白」白擔擔麵</a>(它具有鹹味的烤芝麻味和基於胡椒等香料的芝麻的奶油濃郁和香氣)</span><p>
    <p>---執整行李---<p>
    </div>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-42">________________________________________</span>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">24hr便利店</span>
    <div>
    <p>酒店附近</p>
    <div class="ml-4 mt-2 space-y-2 text-sm">
    <p>附近沒有24hr便利店<p>
    </div>
    </div>
    </li>
    </ul>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- 8月5日行程 -->
    <div class="mb-10 bg-white rounded-lg shadow overflow-hidden">
    <div class="bg-primary text-white p-4">
    <h3 class="text-xl font-bold flex items-center">
    <i class="fa fa-sun-o mr-2"></i>8月5日 星期二 火曜日 Day5
    </h3>
    </div>
    <div class="p-6">
    <ul class="space-y-4">
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">08:15</span>
    <div>
    <p>(早餐)酒店自助早餐</p>
    <div class="ml-4 mt-2 space-y-2 text-sm">
    <p><span class="text-sm text-gray-500"><a href="https://kamenoi-hotels.com/tw/asoparkresort/restaurant/breakfast/" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">自助早餐供</a>07:00～09:00</span><p>
    <p><span class="text-sm text-gray-500"><a href="https://kamenoi-hotels.com/asoparkresort/restaurant/breakfast/img/osusume/3.webp" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">熊本特產“太平根</a></span><p>
    <p><span class="text-sm text-gray-500"><a href="https://kamenoi-hotels.com/asoparkresort/restaurant/breakfast/img/osusume/1.webp" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">現場燒烤“鹽烤青花魚”</a></span><p>
    <p><span class="text-sm text-gray-500"><a href="https://kamenoi-hotels.com/asoparkresort/restaurant/breakfast/img/osusume/2.jpg?20241016" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">安倍農場的鮮榨牛奶</a></span><p>
    </div>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">09:15</span>
    <div>
    <p>出發往 <a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/G96XiVFyDXrf1rnz7" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">直升機停車場</a>.<a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/sNM17ZgYpvWph3bR8" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">(25min車程)</a></p>
    <div class="ml-4 mt-2 space-y-2 text-sm">
    <p>只可當日到直升機停車場預約行程</p>
    </div>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">11:45</span>
    <div>
    <p>出發往 <a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/Mzry73DSMqX2LVnf7" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">草千里展望所</a>.<a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/wzd97vp6erwUgWKC8" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">(5min車程)</a></p>
    <div class="ml-4 mt-2 space-y-2 text-sm">
    <p>阿蘇火山博物館</span><p>
    <p>景觀餐廳 新草千里 <span class="text-sm text-gray-500"><a href="https://www.newkusasenri.com/info/data/1.pdf" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">MENU</a></span><p>
    </div>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">09:15</span>
    <div>
    <p>出發往 <a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/G96XiVFyDXrf1rnz7" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">花火大會(6個場館(篠山、京町、小森野、長門石、三養基、鳥栖))</a>.<a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/sNM17ZgYpvWph3bR8" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">(25min車程)</a></p>
    <div class="ml-4 mt-2 space-y-2 text-sm">
    <p>地點</p>
    </div>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">20:00</span>
    <div>
    <p>入住酒店及休息 <a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/4zn4q872SH7iPzT38" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">東横INN西鉄久留米駅東口</a>.<a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/sB9jex4Zrie1mb4PA" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">(20min車程)</a></p>
    <div class="ml-4 mt-2 space-y-2 text-sm">
    <p><span class="text-sm text-gray-500"><a href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1w1BCT7EG9XF1CywWUToYmMp7ZFfd6JN2/view?usp=drive_link" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">booking ticket</a></span>
    <p>---執整行李---<p>
    </div>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-42">________________________________________</span>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">24hr便利店</span>
    <div>
    <p>酒店附近</p>
    <div class="ml-4 mt-2 space-y-2 text-sm">
    <p>7-11 久留米中央店 <span class="text-sm text-gray-500"><a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/2TiXAGCftE6vCbiv7" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">Map</a></span><p>
    <p>7-11 久留米天神町店 <span class="text-sm text-gray-500"><a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/A9Kt9D8XHh6QwSxTA" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">Map</a></span><p>
    </div>
    </div>
    </li>
    </ul>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- 8月6日行程 -->
    <div class="mb-10 bg-white rounded-lg shadow overflow-hidden">
    <div class="bg-primary text-white p-4">
    <h3 class="text-xl font-bold flex items-center">
    <i class="fa fa-sun-o mr-2"></i>8月6日 星期三 水曜日 Day6
    </h3>
    </div>
    <div class="p-6">
    <ul class="space-y-4">
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">09:00</span>
    <div>
    <p>出發往 <a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/aQochNNJtUfBDa3P6" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">太宰府天滿宮</a>.<a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/n786YTE7YuXCkeQv8" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">(55min車程)</a></p>
    <div class="ml-4 mt-2 space-y-2 text-sm">
    <p><span class="text-sm text-gray-500">太宰府停車場(太宰府パーキング)<a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/f7yQECMsDUehwzbi8" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">MAP</a></span>
    <p><span class="text-sm text-gray-500">松尾駐車場<a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/Xq7JioUvBx1J9EfZ9" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">MAP</a></span>
    <p><span class="text-sm text-gray-500">宰府3丁目パーキングⅡ停車場<a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/o5mRVp745CuncHpA9" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">MAP</a></span>
    <p><span class="text-sm text-gray-500">本殿の目の前駐車場<a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/5Kx5rRAdAxVRF4Ew7" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">MAP</a></span>
    <p><span class="text-sm text-gray-500">太宰府天滿宮駐車場(近太宰府火車站)<a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/ddhuh8CNPx8eh9hr9" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">MAP</a></span>
    </div>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">11:00</span>
    <div>
    <p>(午餐)出發往 <a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/3k7dDhn9RFWS6iqM8" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">太宰府火車</a>.<a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/sFMAcgSsLBoAjNyN9" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">(10min步行)</a></p>
    <div class="ml-4 mt-2 space-y-2 text-sm">
    <p><span class="text-sm text-gray-500">星巴克 太宰府天滿宮表參道店<a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/pXTQTLGdtW2sHCbT8" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">MAP</a></span>
    <p><span class="text-sm text-gray-500">草莓最中·大福天山本店<a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/15AeXz7FvrmiRUkr7" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">MENU</a> , <a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/k3hjHgHSA9BzgADdA" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">MAP</a></span>
    <p><span class="text-sm text-gray-500">拉麵 魁源<a href="https://ramen-oigen.jp/menu/" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">MENU</a> , <a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/59bZWcVZKaMeTnVy8" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">MAP</a></span>
    <p><span class="text-sm text-gray-500">抹茶スイーツ処茶和々太宰府店<a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/2YkfkHPuk5b98TwU7" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">MENU</a> , <a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/BvEw2iB1AshJqYv86" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">MAP</a></span>
    <p><span class="text-sm text-gray-500">太宰府兎珈琲<a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/mfzA65qv1Byc6AbG6" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">MENU</a> , <a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/3nk1xRqF86tGe1bZ8" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">MAP</a></span>
    <p><span class="text-sm text-gray-500">上島珈琲店太宰府店<a href="https://www.ueshima-coffee-ten.jp/menu/" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">MENU</a> , <a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/WGN2xCEYVjguov9p8" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">MAP</a></span>
    </div>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">11:45</span>
    <div>
    <p>出發往 <a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/zBZeidDrL83f1pHc8" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">鳥栖Outlet</a>.<a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/YU1115dc2cjsnAmTA" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">(25min車程)</a></p>
    <div class="ml-4 mt-2 space-y-2 text-sm">
    <p><span class="text-sm text-gray-500">TOSU PREMIUM OUTLETS®<a href="https://platinumaps.jp/d/premiumoutlets-tosu?culture=en&c=po_c6&floor=1F" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">電子地圖</a></span>
    <p><span class="text-sm text-gray-500">提供外國遊客優惠券<a href="https://www.premiumoutlets.co.jp/cht/tosu/events/#aid_2538" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">請掃描場內QR code取得優惠券</a></span>
    </div>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">18:45</span>
    <div>
    <p>出發往 <a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/efoSduqcqPa3PdMLA" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">焼肉きんぐ鳥栖店</a>.<a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/sB9jex4Zrie1mb4PA" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">(10min車程)</a></p>
    <div class="ml-4 mt-2 space-y-2 text-sm">
    <p><span class="text-sm text-gray-500">Book左19:20, <a href="https://BT.com" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">booking ticket</a></span>
    <p><span class="text-sm text-gray-500">鳥栖市 , <a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/1MbqchPQN6y7BDkU9" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">ENEOS 鳥栖インターSS(喜多村)</a><strong style="color:#FF5733">加油站</strong></span>
    </div>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">20:00</span>
    <div>
    <p>返住酒店及休息 <a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/4zn4q872SH7iPzT38" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">東横INN西鉄久留米駅東口</a>.<a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/sB9jex4Zrie1mb4PA" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">(20min車程)</a></p>
    <div class="ml-4 mt-2 space-y-2 text-sm">
    <p><span class="text-sm text-gray-500"><a href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1c04GA7R5V3zXkWr5o7fpZSGQwbd3rQPa/view?usp=drive_link" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">booking ticket A</a> , <span class="text-sm text-gray-500"><a href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1JjsdRTdXOhk6hR0ndMnbpoVsxjjfXIDe/view?usp=drive_link" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">booking ticket K</a></span>
    <p>---執整行李---<p>
    </div>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-42">________________________________________</span>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">24hr便利店</span>
    <div>
    <p>酒店附近</p>
    <div class="ml-4 mt-2 space-y-2 text-sm">
    <p>7-11 久留米中央店 <span class="text-sm text-gray-500"><a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/2TiXAGCftE6vCbiv7" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">Map</a></span><p>
    <p>7-11 久留米天神町店 <span class="text-sm text-gray-500"><a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/A9Kt9D8XHh6QwSxTA" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">Map</a></span><p>
    </div>
    </div>
    </li>
    </ul>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- 8月7日行程 -->
    <div class="mb-10 bg-white rounded-lg shadow overflow-hidden">
    <div class="bg-primary text-white p-4">
    <h3 class="text-xl font-bold flex items-center">
    <i class="fa fa-sun-o mr-2"></i>8月7日 星期四 木曜日 Day7
    </h3>
    </div>
    <div class="p-6">
    <ul class="space-y-4">
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">08:15</span>
    <p>(早餐)酒店自助早餐</p>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">09:15</span>
    <p>出發往 <a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/6F96zHFdsec7Eef86" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">浮羽神社(千本鳥居 )</a>.<a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/QvddnUcawFxzuemS6" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">(45min車程)</a></p>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">11:00</span>
    <div>
    <p>出發往 <a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/Pm22yqJwfXQA9n4aA" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">九重夢大吊橋</a>.<a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/kXAQQKgjyWzyTTsT6" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">(80min車程)</a></p>
    <div class="ml-4 mt-2 space-y-2 text-sm">
    <p><span class="text-sm text-gray-500">成人 500日圓, 中小學生 200日圓 <a href="https://www.yumeooturihashi.com/twn/" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">網頁</a></p>
    <div>
    <div>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">13:00</span>
    <div>
    <p>出發往 <a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/6Y9rd6WDiNpCjBzA8" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">由布院</a>(80min)</p>
    <div class="ml-4 mt-2 space-y-2 text-sm">
    <p><span class="text-sm text-gray-500">食<a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/4zn4q872SH7iPzT38" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">MENU</a> , <a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/sB9jex4Zrie1mb4PA" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">MAP</a></p>
    <div>
    <div>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">17:00</span>
    <div>
    <p>出發往 <a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/o4uReQd8k7bRJt7b8" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">マルショクやまなみ店(Super Maket)</a>.<a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/MxcTVnKfULPs8URs5" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">(35min車程)</a></p>
    <div class="ml-4 mt-2 space-y-2 text-sm">
    <p>買聽日早餐同晚餐、零食、宵夜</p>
    <div>
    <div>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">18:30</span>
    <p>出發往 <a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/aUeoQd4MJ5SujGS7A" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">UND STAY Premium Luxury Vacation</a>.<a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/MPhm9viE8Fx26XBL6" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">(5min車程)</a></p>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">19:15</span>
    <div>
    <p>出發往 <a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/BJzKzuJq8LiH81idA" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">砂浴 葫蘆溫泉</a>.<a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/sxyd3kkV4dPpQHiQ8" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">(5min車程)</a></p>
    <div class="ml-4 mt-2 space-y-2 text-sm">
    <p><span class="text-sm text-gray-500">葫蘆溫泉 <a href="https://www.hyotan-onsen.com/food/index.html#food-restaurant" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">網頁</a></p>
    <p>開放時間: 09:00～01:00</p>
    <p><span class="text-sm text-gray-500">食<a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/4zn4q872SH7iPzT38" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">MENU</a> , <a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/sB9jex4Zrie1mb4PA" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">MAP</a></p>
    <div>
    <div>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">22:00</span>
    <p>回酒店休息 <a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/aUeoQd4MJ5SujGS7A" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">UND STAY Premium Luxury Vacation</a>.<a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/uFpsAC5hTQJdDNdFA" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">(5min車程)</a></p>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-42">________________________________________</span>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">24hr便利店</span>
    <div>
    <p>酒店附近</p>
    <div class="ml-4 mt-2 space-y-2 text-sm">
    <p>Lawson 別府北中店 <span class="text-sm text-gray-500"><a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/X9CqTBEyLun5EN6C6" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">Map</a></span><p>
    </div>
    </div>
    </li>
    </ul>
    </div>
    </div>
    <!-- 8月8日行程 -->
    <div class="mb-10 bg-white rounded-lg shadow overflow-hidden">
    <div class="bg-primary text-white p-4">
    <h3 class="text-xl font-bold flex items-center">
    <i class="fa fa-sun-o mr-2"></i>8月8日 星期五 金曜日 Day8
    </h3>
    </div>
    <div class="p-6">
    <ul class="space-y-4">
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">08:30</span>
    <p>(早餐)酒店自助早餐</p>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">10:00</span>
    <p>出發往 <a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/w6fKK89KvWrURKs29" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">雲仙多良展望台</a>(60min)</p>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">11:45</span>
    <p>出發往 <a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/7chZTBYb1asxFsR78" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">大三東車站</a>(30min)</p>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">12:45</span>
    <p>碼頭附近買烏冬早D上船食</p>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">13:30</span>
    <p>必須到達 <a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/XWVo2RUpY6vgYsJX6" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">多比良港</a>準備上船</p>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">13:55</span>
    <p>多比良港座船開往 <a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/DtpMZUBTMJRQ5BGQA" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">長洲港</a>(45min)</p>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">15:00</span>
    <p>出發往 <a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/MbjQWy2pXq2xBuh66" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">ASO田園空間博物館総合案内所(道の駅阿蘇)</a>(90 min)</p>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">16:50</span>
    <p>出發往 <a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/ztjHnp7dLXaUXfdV8" target="_blank"style="color: blue; text-decoration: underline;">龜之井阿蘇公園度假村</a>(5 min)</p>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">17:00</span>
    <div>
    <p>入住酒店及浸酒店溫泉</p>
    </div>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">19:30</span>
    <div>
    <p>(晚餐)酒店自助晚餐</p>
    <span class="text-sm text-gray-500">自助晚餐分為兩時段: 1st 18:00-19:30, 2nd 19:30-21:00</span>
    </div>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">21:00</span>
    <p>回酒店房間休息</p>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-42">________________________________________</span>
    </li>
    <li class="flex">
    <span class="text-neutral font-semibold w-24">24hr便利店</span>
    <div>

    <div class="ml-4 mt-2 space-y-2 text-sm">

    </div>
    </div>
    </li>
    </ul>
    </div>
    </div>
